  ---
title: "Asthma ED Visits and Precipitation Analysis"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
```

```{r libraries}
library(here)
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)
library(splines)
library(mgcv)
library(ggplot2)
```

```{r paths}
# Set paths
DataPath   <- here::here()          
OutputPath <- here::here('output')
dir.create(OutputPath, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
```

```{r load-data}
# Read in data
dta <- read_csv(here::here(DataPath, "asthma_precip_age.csv"))

# aggregate to NYC level: sum ER counts, average ppt across boroughs
# per date and age group
dta.nyc <- dta %>%
  group_by(date, age) %>%
  summarize(
    asthma_er_count = sum(asthma_er_count, na.rm = TRUE),
    ppt             = mean(ppt,             na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# clean age group labels
dta.nyc <- dta.nyc %>%
  mutate(age = case_when(
    age == "Ages 0-4 years"   ~ "0-4",
    age == "Ages 5-17 years"  ~ "5-17",
    age == "Ages 18-64 years" ~ "18-64",
    age == "Ages 65+ years"   ~ "65+",
    age == "All age groups"   ~ "All",
    TRUE                      ~ age
  ),
  age = factor(age, levels = c("All", "0-4", "5-17", "18-64", "65+")))

dta.nyc %>% count(date) %>% summary()

# extract day of week
dta.nyc <- dta.nyc %>%
  mutate(DayofWeek = as.character(wday(date, label = TRUE)))

# factor with Sunday-anchored week order
dta.nyc$DayofWeek <- factor(dta.nyc$DayofWeek,
                            levels = c("Sun", "Mon", "Tue", "Wed", "Thu", "Fri", "Sat"))

# compute number of years for spline df
yr_num <- length(unique(year(dta.nyc$date)))

# split data into one dataframe per age group
dta.list <- dta.nyc %>%
  group_by(age) %>%
  group_split() %>%
  setNames(levels(dta.nyc$age))
```

```{r primary-model}
# base model: log1p(ppt) as ns(1 df), time spline 4 df/year

fit_qp <- function(df) {
  glm(asthma_er_count ~
        ns(log1p(ppt), df = 1) +
        DayofWeek +
        ns(date, df = 24),
      family = "quasipoisson",
      data   = df)
}

mods.primary <- lapply(dta.list, fit_qp)

extract_irr <- function(mod) {
  coef.mat <- summary(mod)$coef
  coef_ppt <- coef.mat[2, 1]
  se_ppt   <- coef.mat[2, 2]
  data.frame(
    irr        = exp(coef_ppt),
    lci        = exp(coef_ppt - 1.96 * se_ppt),
    uci        = exp(coef_ppt + 1.96 * se_ppt),
    dispersion = summary(mod)$dispersion
  )
}

results.primary <- bind_rows(lapply(mods.primary, extract_irr), .id = "age")
results.primary
```

```{r sensitivity-lag}
# sensitivity 1: lag (1-3 days)

dta.nyc <- dta.nyc %>% arrange(date)

dta.list.lag <- lapply(dta.list, function(df) {
  df %>% arrange(date) %>%
    mutate(
      ppt_lag1 = (ppt + lag(ppt, 1)) / 2,
      ppt_lag2 = (ppt + lag(ppt, 1) + lag(ppt, 2)) / 3,
      ppt_lag3 = (ppt + lag(ppt, 1) + lag(ppt, 2) + lag(ppt, 3)) / 4
    )
})

fit_qp_lag <- function(df, lag_var) {
  glm(as.formula(paste0(
    "asthma_er_count ~ ns(log1p(", lag_var, "), df = 1) + DayofWeek + ns(date, df = 4 * yr_num)")),
    family = "quasipoisson",
    data   = df)
}

lag_vars <- c("ppt_lag1", "ppt_lag2", "ppt_lag3")

mods.sens.lag <- lapply(lag_vars, function(lv) {
  lapply(dta.list.lag, fit_qp_lag, lag_var = lv)
})
names(mods.sens.lag) <- lag_vars

results.sens.lag <- bind_rows(
  lapply(names(mods.sens.lag), function(lv) {
    bind_rows(lapply(mods.sens.lag[[lv]], extract_irr), .id = "age") %>%
      mutate(lag = lv)
  })
)
results.sens.lag
```

```{r sensitivity-ppt-df}
# sensitivity 2: ppt spline df (1-3)

ppt_dfs <- 1:3

fit_qp_pptdf <- function(df, ppt_df) {
  glm(as.formula(paste0(
    "asthma_er_count ~ ns(log1p(ppt), df = ", ppt_df, ") + DayofWeek + ns(date, df = 4 * yr_num)")),
    family = "quasipoisson",
    data   = df)
}

mods.sens.ppt <- lapply(ppt_dfs, function(pd) {
  lapply(dta.list, fit_qp_pptdf, ppt_df = pd)
})
names(mods.sens.ppt) <- paste0("ppt_df", ppt_dfs)

results.sens.ppt <- bind_rows(
  lapply(names(mods.sens.ppt), function(pd) {
    bind_rows(lapply(mods.sens.ppt[[pd]], extract_irr), .id = "age") %>%
      mutate(ppt_df = pd)
  })
)
results.sens.ppt
```

```{r sensitivity-time-df}
# sensitivity 3: time spline df (24-32, i.e. 6-8 df/year)

sens_df <- 24:32

fit_qp_timedf <- function(df, df_time) {
  glm(as.formula(paste0(
    "asthma_er_count ~ ns(log1p(ppt), df = 1) + DayofWeek + ns(date, df = ", df_time, ")")),
    family = "quasipoisson",
    data   = df)
}

mods.sens.time <- lapply(sens_df, function(dt) {
  lapply(dta.list, fit_qp_timedf, df_time = dt)
})
names(mods.sens.time) <- paste0("df", sens_df)

results.sens.time <- bind_rows(
  lapply(names(mods.sens.time), function(dt) {
    bind_rows(lapply(mods.sens.time[[dt]], extract_irr), .id = "age") %>%
      mutate(time_df = dt)
  })
)
results.sens.time
```

```{r plot-timeseries-daily}
# set age factor order for all plots

dta.nyc$age <- factor(dta.nyc$age, levels = c("All", "0-4", "5-17", "18-64", "65+"))

yr_num <- length(unique(year(dta.nyc$date)))

# 1. time series scatter of daily ED visits by age group

p <- ggplot(dta.nyc, aes(date, asthma_er_count)) +
  geom_point(color = "mediumpurple3", alpha = 0.3, size = 0.8) +
  facet_grid(age ~ ., scales = "free_y") +
  labs(x = "Date", y = "Daily asthma ED visits") +
  theme_bw()
png(here::here(OutputPath, "TimeSeries_Asthma_dailyObs.png"), 
    width = 1200, height = 800)
print(p)
dev.off()
p
```

```{r plot-timeseries-trends}
# 2. smoothed trend: seasonal + long-term by age group

p <- ggplot(dta.nyc, aes(date, asthma_er_count)) +
  geom_smooth(color = "mediumpurple3", method = lm,
              formula = y ~ ns(x, df = 4 * yr_num)) +
  geom_smooth(color = "darkorange2", method = lm,
              formula = y ~ ns(x, df = 1 * yr_num)) +
  facet_grid(age ~ ., scales = "free_y") +
  labs(x = "Date", y = "Daily asthma ED visits",
       caption = "Purple = seasonal trend (4 df/year)  |  Orange = long-term trend (1 df/year)") +
  theme_bw()
png(here::here(OutputPath, "TimeSeries_Asthma_trends.png"),
    width = 1200, height = 800)
print(p)
dev.off()
p
```

```{r plot-precipitation}
# 3. precipitation time series

dta.ppt <- dta.nyc %>% filter(age == "All")

p <- ggplot(dta.ppt, aes(date, ppt)) +
  geom_line(color = "cadetblue3", alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_smooth(color = "cadetblue4", method = lm,
              formula = y ~ ns(x, df = 4 * yr_num)) +
  labs(x = "Date", y = "Precipitation (mm)") +
  theme_bw()
png(here::here(OutputPath, "TimeSeries_Precipitation.png"),
    width = 1200, height = 400)
print(p)
dev.off()
p
```

```{r plot-dow}
# 4. day of week bar chart by age group

dta.dow <- dta.nyc %>%
  group_by(DayofWeek, age) %>%
  summarize(meanED = mean(asthma_er_count), .groups = "drop")

p <- ggplot(dta.dow, aes(DayofWeek, meanED)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "mediumpurple3") +
  facet_grid(age ~ ., scales = "free_y") +
  labs(x = "Day of the week", y = "Mean daily asthma ED visits") +
  theme_bw()
png(here::here(OutputPath, "DoW_Asthma_byAge.png"),
    width = 1200, height = 800)
print(p)
dev.off()
p
```

```{r plot-seasonal}
# 5. seasonal plot: average ED visits by month by age group

dta.nyc <- dta.nyc %>%
  mutate(month = factor(month(date, label = TRUE),
                        levels = c("Jan","Feb","Mar","Apr","May","Jun",
                                   "Jul","Aug","Sep","Oct","Nov","Dec")))

dta.month <- dta.nyc %>%
  group_by(month, age) %>%
  summarize(meanED = mean(asthma_er_count), .groups = "drop")

p <- ggplot(dta.month, aes(month, meanED, group = age)) +
  geom_line(color = "mediumpurple3") +
  geom_point(color = "mediumpurple4") +
  facet_grid(age ~ ., scales = "free_y") +
  labs(x = "Month", y = "Mean daily asthma ED visits") +
  theme_bw()
png(here::here(OutputPath, "Seasonal_Asthma_byAge.png"),
    width = 1200, height = 800)
print(p)
dev.off()
p
```

```{r plot-precipitation-smoothed}
# filter to one row per date (ppt is identical across age groups)
dta.ppt <- dta.nyc %>% filter(age == "All")

yr_num <- length(unique(year(dta.ppt$date)))

# smoothed precipitation time series
p <- ggplot(dta.ppt, aes(date, ppt)) +
  geom_point(color = "cadetblue3", alpha = 0.3, size = 0.8) +
  geom_smooth(color = "cadetblue4", method = lm,
              formula = y ~ ns(x, df = 4 * yr_num)) +
  geom_smooth(color = "darkorange2", method = lm,
              formula = y ~ ns(x, df = 1 * yr_num)) +
  labs(x = "Date",
       y = "Precipitation (mm)",
       caption = "Blue = seasonal trend (4 df/year)  |  Orange = long-term trend (1 df/year)") +
  theme_bw()
png(here::here(OutputPath, "TimeSeries_Precipitation_smoothed.png"),
    width = 1200, height = 400)
print(p)
dev.off()
p
# 6. forest plot of IRRs from primary model

results.primary$age <- factor(results.primary$age,
                              levels = c("All", "0-4", "5-17", "18-64", "65+"))

p <- ggplot(results.primary, aes(x = irr, y = age)) +
  geom_point(color = "mediumpurple3", size = 3) +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = lci, xmax = uci),
                 height = 0.2, color = "mediumpurple3") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
  labs(x = "Incidence rate ratio (95% CI)",
       y = "Age group",
       caption = "Primary model: ns(log1p(ppt), df=1) + DayofWeek + ns(date, df=28)") +
  theme_bw()
png(here::here(OutputPath, "ForestPlot_IRR_byAge.png"),
    width = 800, height = 500)
print(p)
dev.off()
p
```

```{r final-model}
#final model after sensitivity analysis 
fit_qp <- function(df) {
  glm(asthma_er_count ~
        ns(log1p(ppt), df = 1) +
        DayofWeek +
        ns(date, df = 28),
      family = "quasipoisson",
      data   = df)
}

glimpse(dta.nyc)
```
